Our experienced professionals are committed to delivering value, integrity, and results for every client.

At CW Real Estate, we don&rsquo;t just build and sell properties&mdash;we create communities, investments, and lifestyle opportunities that stand the test of time. Whether you&rsquo;re a first-time buyer, seasoned investor, or corporate partner, we&rsquo;re here to help you make smart, informed real estate decisions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Commercial Lead Broker

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Thelead commercial broker will spearhead CW Real Estate&rsquo;scommercial transactions, focusing onoffice building disposals,office floorsales, commercial leasing,and enterprise-level acquisition mandates.
	This role requires an experienced professional withdeep knowledge of the Lagos commercial propertymarket, particularly withinVictoria Island, Ikoyi, Oniru, and Lekki business corridors.
	The ideal candidate is ahigh-performing commercial dealmakerwith a proven record ofclosing high-value commercial real estate transactions, building relationships withcorporate occupiers, institutional investors,and developers, and managing complexasset-level deals.
	The role is critical to strengthening CW Commercial as it expands beyond leasing intostrategic commercial brokerage and enterprise real estate advisory.


Key Responsibilities
Commercial Brokerage &amp; Transactions:


	Lead negotiations and execution of commercial property sales and leasing transactions.
	Handle office building disposals, office floor sales, and commercial asset transactions.
	Manageenterprise acquisition briefs from corporate clients.
	Structure and close high-valuecommercial real estate deals.


Mandate Acquisition:


	Source and secure exclusive commercial property mandates from developers, investors, and institutional owners.
	Identify opportunities foroffice building sales, portfolio disposals, and commercial acquisitions.
	Position CW Commercial as apreferred brokerage for asset-level transactions.


Enterprise Client Engagement:


	Develop relationships with corporate occupiers, enterprise clients, multinational firms, and institutional investors.
	Provide advisory support to businesses seeking&nbsp;office headquarters, expansion spaces, or investment properties.
	Manage long-term client relationships and strategic mandates.


Market Intelligence &amp; Advisory:


	Maintain strong knowledge of the commercial real estate landscape in Lagos CBD markets.
	Track trends in office demand, investment sales, and commercial leasing activity.
	Advise clients on pricing strategies, investment opportunities, and market positioning.


Collaboration &amp; Internal Coordination:


	Work closely with marketing and media teams to promote commercial listings and mandates.
	Coordinate with legal, operations, and management teams to ensure smooth transaction execution.
	Support the strategic growth of theCW Commercial division.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in&nbsp;Estate Management, Real Estate, Business Administration, Finance, or related field.
	Must have 5&ndash;8 years of experience in real estate brokerage, preferably commercial real estate.
	Proven experience handling office sales, commercial leasing, or commercial investment transactions.
	Strong knowledge of Lagos commercial districts (VI, Ikoyi, Oniru, Lekki).
	Demonstrated track record of closing commercial deals.


Preferred Experience:


	Experience working with corporate tenants, developers, or institutional investors.
	Knowledge of commercial property valuation and investment analysis.
	Experience handling asset-level transactions or building disposals.


Added Advantage:


	Existingnet work of commercial property owners, investors, and corporate tenants.
	Professional certifications inreal estate or property brokerage.
	Strengths or personality evaluation (e.g., CliftonStrengths, DISC, or similar).
	Experience inenterprise-level real estate advisory.


Key Competencies:


	Commercial deal structuring
	High-value negotiation
	Enterprise relationship management
	Market intelligence and investment advisory
	Strategic business development
	Closing complex real estate transactions


Personal Attributes:


	Highly strategic and commercially minded
	Strong closer with a results-driven mindset
	Professional presence when dealing with corporate clients
	Strong negotiation and persuasion skills
	High level of integrity and professionalism


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Benefits (for Full-Time roles): HMO, Pension, company-provided technology Materials.
	Additional Perks: Opportunity for creative freedom, portfolio building with high-value properties, and potential for performance-based bonuses.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Commercial Lead Broker Job at CW Real Estate




        
    

        
        CW Real Estate is a forward-thinking real estate firm redefining the property experience across Nigeria and beyond. We specialize in premium residential and commercial properties, offering tailored solutions combining innovation, expertise, and an in-depth market understanding. Driven by a passion for excellence, we provide end-to-end services—from property acquisition and development to sales, leasing, and property management. Our experienced professionals are committed to delivering value, integrity, and results for every client.

At CW Real Estate, we don’t just build and sell properties—we create communities, investments, and lifestyle opportunities that stand the test of time. Whether you’re a first-time buyer, seasoned investor, or corporate partner, we’re here to help you make smart, informed real estate decisions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Commercial Lead Broker

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Thelead commercial broker will spearhead CW Real Estate’scommercial transactions, focusing onoffice building disposals,office floorsales, commercial leasing,and enterprise-level acquisition mandates.
	This role requires an experienced professional withdeep knowledge of the Lagos commercial propertymarket, particularly withinVictoria Island, Ikoyi, Oniru, and Lekki business corridors.
	The ideal candidate is ahigh-performing commercial dealmakerwith a proven record ofclosing high-value commercial real estate transactions, building relationships withcorporate occupiers, institutional investors,and developers, and managing complexasset-level deals.
	The role is critical to strengthening CW Commercial as it expands beyond leasing intostrategic commercial brokerage and enterprise real estate advisory.


Key Responsibilities
Commercial Brokerage & Transactions:


	Lead negotiations and execution of commercial property sales and leasing transactions.
	Handle office building disposals, office floor sales, and commercial asset transactions.
	Manageenterprise acquisition briefs from corporate clients.
	Structure and close high-valuecommercial real estate deals.


Mandate Acquisition:


	Source and secure exclusive commercial property mandates from developers, investors, and institutional owners.
	Identify opportunities foroffice building sales, portfolio disposals, and commercial acquisitions.
	Position CW Commercial as apreferred brokerage for asset-level transactions.


Enterprise Client Engagement:


	Develop relationships with corporate occupiers, enterprise clients, multinational firms, and institutional investors.
	Provide advisory support to businesses seeking office headquarters, expansion spaces, or investment properties.
	Manage long-term client relationships and strategic mandates.


Market Intelligence & Advisory:


	Maintain strong knowledge of the commercial real estate landscape in Lagos CBD markets.
	Track trends in office demand, investment sales, and commercial leasing activity.
	Advise clients on pricing strategies, investment opportunities, and market positioning.


Collaboration & Internal Coordination:


	Work closely with marketing and media teams to promote commercial listings and mandates.
	Coordinate with legal, operations, and management teams to ensure smooth transaction execution.
	Support the strategic growth of theCW Commercial division.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Estate Management, Real Estate, Business Administration, Finance, or related field.
	Must have 5–8 years of experience in real estate brokerage, preferably commercial real estate.
	Proven experience handling office sales, commercial leasing, or commercial investment transactions.
	Strong knowledge of Lagos commercial districts (VI, Ikoyi, Oniru, Lekki).
	Demonstrated track record of closing commercial deals.


Preferred Experience:


	Experience working with corporate tenants, developers, or institutional investors.
	Knowledge of commercial property valuation and investment analysis.
	Experience handling asset-level transactions or building disposals.


Added Advantage:


	Existingnet work of commercial property owners, investors, and corporate tenants.
	Professional certifications inreal estate or property brokerage.
	Strengths or personality evaluation (e.g., CliftonStrengths, DISC, or similar).
	Experience inenterprise-level real estate advisory.


Key Competencies:


	Commercial deal structuring
	High-value negotiation
	Enterprise relationship management
	Market intelligence and investment advisory
	Strategic business development
	Closing complex real estate transactions


Personal Attributes:


	Highly strategic and commercially minded
	Strong closer with a results-driven mindset
	Professional presence when dealing with corporate clients
	Strong negotiation and persuasion skills
	High level of integrity and professionalism


Compensation & Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Benefits (for Full-Time roles): HMO, Pension, company-provided technology Materials.
	Additional Perks: Opportunity for creative freedom, portfolio building with high-value properties, and potential for performance-based bonuses.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Ren San &amp; Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers, we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description


	As the Digital Marketer, you will be a vital part of the support system for the company. Your responsibilities will include managing the company&#39;s three (3) social media presences, and overseeing social media campaigns.
	Additionally, you will use Canva and other graphic design tools to create original video and text content, manage posts, and engage with followers.
	Your knowledge of the latest social media trends, creativity, and exceptional communication skills will be crucial to your success in this role.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation and Management:


	Develop comprehensive social media content strategies that reflect the organisation&#39;s objectives, ensuring each content aligns with overarching goals.
	Produce high-quality graphics, videos, and written posts using tools like Canva and other graphic design platforms, ensuring all content is visually appealing and professionally crafted.
	Plan and execute the timely release of posts across various social media platforms, optimising posting schedules to maximise audience engagement and reach.
	Regularly monitor and analyse audience preferences, new technologies, emerging social media trends, and design tools to ensure content generated remains relevant and engaging.


Social Media Management:


	Respond to comments and messages, and foster discussions to build a vibrant and active online community.
	Suggest and implement new features or initiatives to increase brand awareness and grow the online community.
	Oversee the daily management of all social media channels, including Instagram, and tailor content to suit various platforms and target audiences.
	Develop, manage, and track budgets allocated for social media activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources.
	Serve as the primary contact for customers engaging with the brand on social media, ensuring prompt and professional responses.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media platforms to reinforce brand identity.
	Select and curate high-quality images and visual assets that effectively communicate the brand story and resonate with the target audience.
	Organise and maintain a content library of images, videos, and creative assets for ongoing and future use.


Social Media Campaigns:


	Plan, develop, and execute targeted social media campaigns aligned with marketing and business objectives.
	Create campaign calendars, define key messaging, and coordinate content rollout across platforms.
	Track and evaluate campaign performance using analytics tools, providing insights and recommendations for optimisation.
	Collaborate with internal teams to align campaigns with product launches, promotions, and key business initiatives.


Sales Support:


	Maintain a comprehensive understanding of company products/services and ensure that all customer inquiries are answered accurately and promptly, providing a positive and informed customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales personnel to align customer needs and expectations and deliver a cohesive customer experience.
	Proactively engage with customers to understand their needs, preferences, and feedback. Follow up with potential and existing customers to ensure their needs are being met and to identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling.
	Collect and analyse customer feedback, sales data, and market trends to provide actionable insights to the sales and marketing teams.


Data Protection and Confidentiality:


	Uphold strict confidentiality standards when handling all executive and personal information.
	Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and internal policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 3 years experience.
	Previous experience as a Digital Marketer with a previous track record of building engaged communities.
	A solid understanding of the use of a range of social media platforms
	Strong copywriting and editing skills suitable for each platform, from knowing how to write a successful caption to effective storytelling techniques.
	Creative skills for contributing new and innovative ideas
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image and video) via graphic design tools such as Canva and others.
	Strong communication and people skills.
	Excellent organisational skills, time management and multitasking capabilities.
	Discretion, reliability, and a professional appearance and demeanour.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team and independently.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;ryanosakweogo@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Ren San &amp; Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers, we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type:&nbsp;Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description


	As the Social Media Manager, you will be a vital part of the support system for the company. Your responsibilities will include managing the company&#39;s three (3) social media presences, and overseeing social media campaigns.
	Additionally, you will use Canva and other graphic design tools to create original video and text content, manage posts, and engage with followers. Your knowledge of the latest social media trends, creativity, and exceptional communication skills will be crucial to your success in this role.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation and Management:


	Develop comprehensive social media content strategies that reflect the organisation&#39;s objectives, ensuring each content aligns with overarching goals.
	Produce high-quality graphics, videos, and written posts using tools like Canva and other graphic design platforms, ensuring all content is visually appealing and professionally crafted.
	Plan and execute the timely release of posts across various social media platforms, optimising posting schedules to maximise audience engagement and reach.
	Regularly monitor and analyse audience preferences, new technologies, emerging social media trends, and design tools to ensure content generated remains relevant and engaging.


Social Media Management:


	Respond to comments and messages, and foster discussions to build a vibrant and active online community.
	Suggest and implement new features or initiatives to increase brand awareness and grow the online community.
	Oversee the daily management of all social media channels, including Instagram, and tailor content to suit various platforms and target audiences.
	Develop, manage, and track budgets allocated for social media activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources.
	Serve as the primary contact for customers engaging with the brand on social media, ensuring prompt and professional responses.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media platforms to reinforce brand identity.
	Select and curate high-quality images and visual assets that effectively communicate the brand story and resonate with the target audience.
	Organise and maintain a content library of images, videos, and creative assets for ongoing and future use.


Social Media Campaigns:


	Plan, develop, and execute targeted social media campaigns aligned with marketing and business objectives.
	Create campaign calendars, define key messaging, and coordinate content rollout across platforms.
	Track and evaluate campaign performance using analytics tools, providing insights and recommendations for optimisation.
	Collaborate with internal teams to align campaigns with product launches, promotions, and key business initiatives.


Sales Support:


	Maintain a comprehensive understanding of company products/services and ensure that all customer inquiries are answered accurately and promptly, providing a positive and informed customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales personnel to align customer needs and expectations and deliver a cohesive customer experience.
	Proactively engage with customers to understand their needs, preferences, and feedback. Follow up with potential and existing customers to ensure their needs are being met and to identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling.
	Collect and analyse customer feedback, sales data, and market trends to provide actionable insights to the sales and marketing teams.


Data Protection and Confidentiality:


	Uphold strict confidentiality standards when handling all executive and personal information.
	Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and internal policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 3 years experience.
	Previous experience as a Social Media Manager with a previous track record of building engaged communities.
	A solid understanding of the use of a range of social media platforms
	Strong copywriting and editing skills suitable for each platform, from knowing how to write a successful caption to effective storytelling techniques.
	Creative skills for contributing new and innovative ideas
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image and video) via graphic design tools such as Canva and others.
	Strong communication and people skills.
	Excellent organisational skills, time management and multitasking capabilities.
	Discretion, reliability, and a professional appearance and demeanour.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team and independently.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;ryanosakweogo@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
